productName: Tasty Terps - TC ICE CART 1g - Strawberry Ice - 1g
description: This sativa cartridge loads Strawberry Ice into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of strawberry, mint, and flowery, with an upbeat, talkative energy.
